zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Camville於1192年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親William de Camville43歲，母親Aubreda Marmion36歲。他與Agnes de Cocton在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1236年在英國奧可福爾享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Camville was born in 1192, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, William de Camville, was 43 and his mother, Aubreda Marmion, was 36. He married Agnes de Cocton in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1236, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 44.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Camville(이)가 1192년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Camville(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Aubreda Marmion(은)는 36세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Agnes de Cocton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1236년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.
